name: Spirit Shield
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>死</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>盾</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たて</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per battle, when an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can banish 1 Fiend or Zombie monster from your GY; negate that attack. Once per turn, when your opponent activates a card or effect that would destroy a card(s): You can banish 1 Fiend or Zombie monster from your GY; negate that activation. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if you do not control a Fiend or Zombie monster: Send this card to the GY.
eff: Once per battle, when an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can banish 1 Fiend or Zombie monster from your GY; negate that attack. Once per turn, when your opponent activates a card or effect that would destroy a card(s): You can banish 1 Fiend or Zombie monster from your GY; negate that activation. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if you do not control a Fiend or Zombie monster: Send this card to the GY.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard
mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
